历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including old science college entrance exam) were 14530 → 14430 → 13617 → 16769 → 19645 respectively. After the first new college entrance exam in Anhui Province in 2024, the rankings significantly shifted backward, and in 2025 continued to shift backward by about 2876 places, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6028 places over the past two years, showing a continuous easing trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 19645. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province Physics Category was 124 in 2024, 122 in 2025, and 123 in 2026, with a slight expansion of 1 person (+0.8%) in 2026 compared to 2025, a very small expansion that has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking about 38th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (main campus). Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao shares the main campus's level and degrees, placing it in the upper-middle tier among 985 universities, which strongly attracts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus identity controversies (relationship between Qinhuangdao campus and main campus), with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average (Northeastern University main campus ranks 82nd overall, rated as average), with moderate exposure on short video platforms, showing no significant signs of increased application attention. There have been no recent records of enrollment gaps. Northeastern University has 6 A-level disciplines: Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, and Software Engineering A-, which highly correspond to the majors recruited in Anhui Province such as Computer Class, Automation Class, Mechanical Class, and Materials Class, highlighting strong academic strength and strong appeal to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Province general college entrance exam is about 451,000, a decrease of about 2.4% from 462,179 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 313,896 (a decrease of about 2.1% from 320,779 in 2025), with a slight decrease in total candidates, slightly easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the basically unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in total candidates, the strong appeal of the university's level, and the high match between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, the ranking is expected to slightly move forward based on the 2025 baseline of 19645. The predicted minimum ranking is about 19692, with a range of 19192-20192.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation Class (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Internet of Things Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Communication Engineering
- Mathematics Class (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Mechanical Class (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Instrument Class (including Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Mechanical and Electronic Engineering
- Intelligent Perception Engineering
- Additive Manufacturing Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Class (including Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering, Environmental Engineering)
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Economics Class (including Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- E-commerce
- Business Administration Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 19192-20192, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Automation), and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 19000), focus on aiming for Tier 1 Computer Science and Technology or Automation Class. For rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 20000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 Materials Class or Business Administration Class to secure admission to this university.
